title: Cif Professional Window and Multi-purpose Cleaner Spray 750ml
features: At Cif, we believe in hygiene and sparkling results That’s why for over 50 years, Cif has been developing a range of cleaning products that remove grease and grime, without damage – providing you with a hygienic shine for professional kitchens, washrooms and floors
This Cif Window and Multi-purpose cleaner provides a complete solution for surface and glass cleaning
It is designed to remove grease and grime effectively, without leaving streaks or smudges
This profesional cleaner comes in a trigger spray for easy application
This package contains: 1 x Cif Pro Formula Professional Window and Multi-purpose Cleaner Spray 750ml
